name: latin-america-population-age-structure-dataset
title: Latin America Population Age Structure Dataset
description: Harmonized demographic dataset: population age structure in Latin America (19 countries, 1995-2030). 228 records, 41 variables. Source: CEPALSTAT/ECLAC. DOI: 10.17632/ygkmshr5fv.1

contributors.title: Juan Moisés de la Serna Tuya

sources.title: CEPALSTAT - Economic Commission for Latin America and the Caribbean

resources.name: latin-america-population-age-structure
resources.description: Main dataset: 228 rows, 41 columns. Population age structure for 19 Latin American countries, 1995-2030.
